caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a dark green baseball cap, and large black headphones speaks into a professional black microphone in a studio setting. His t-shirt features the text "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT" with "NETWORK" written smaller underneath. In the background, a white mannequin torso is visible next to clothing racks, and the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs. Small logos for "PROPERLY FIT" appear in the lower corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expressions and gestures. He begins by looking slightly to the side, then looks more directly toward the camera, and eventually raises his left hand in a gesturing motion while speaking. The camera angle remains steady throughout the clip, focusing on the man from the chest up.
